productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Printed Charcoal T-shirt
description: CompositionCharcoal grey round neck T-shirt made of 55% viscose, 30% polyester and 15% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed round neck,  embroidery and print on the chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryAn effortless way to tap into this spring's hottest trends, this T-shirt form arrow is a versatile piece. We suggest that you style this with classic, fitting denims and a denim jacket that is one tone lighter than your trousers.
